entry.value: Exception occurred while performing 'Create' operation on identity 'null': Error: Error executing before operation rule for endpoint 'ActiTime Single Account Aggregation': BeanShell script error: bsh.EvalError: Sourced file: inline evaluation of: ``log.error("=entered into the Get OBject before operaion rule ============="+plan . . .
